description:
ICICI Lombard Elevate is an unlimited health insurance plan that provides unlimited sum insured options and access to an infinite claim amount with the Infinite Care benefit. 

Whereas Star Health Super Star plan provides unlimited medical coverage to the insured once in the lifetime of the policy with the ‘Limitless Care’ benefit. 

In this video, we have compared both ICICI Lombard & Star Health Super Star on the basis of features, eligibility criteria , waiting periods , riders as well as the premiums.

WATCH THE VIDEO FOR MORE DETAILS :)
